title: Lapis's HD Textures
description: This Texture pack adds HD textures to Minecraft
body:

Stand by im this pack is comming out next year (2026) you can also get in in my patreon too

- you should not redistribute this pack
- you should not edit this pack
- you can use this pack
- all the primary block textures are done by now
- current version is a mega alpha(first build in my words) created this morning [12/27/2025]
- This Pack Suports PBR

1. you can get the 32x textures here for free
2. get the 512x pack in my patreon
3. LICENSED UNDER "ALL RIGHT RESERVED"
